note_text: MDT 2026-06-03. 67 y woman, smoker ex. RUL mass around 4.1 cm, PET positive ipsilat mediastinal station 4R, no pleural/brain/adrenal mets seen. EBUS 4R malignant. Hist: adenoCa. EGFR neg, ALK neg, ROS1 neg, KRAS pos. PD-L1 TPS 65%. ECOG 1. Not surgical now because N2. Plan concurrent chemoRT if lung function acceptable, oncology to book. Some old line says 'op?' from referral, ignore after PET/EBUS.

MDT note 2026-06-04. Male 74. LLL lesion about 2.6 cm, peripheral. No PET-avid nodes. No distant disease on staging CT. Biopsy: squamous NSCLC. ECOG 2, severe COPD and poor reserve. EGFR/ALK/ROS1 neg. PD-L1 10%. Not for lobectomy. SABR favoured, rad onc referral. Typo in scan text says 'LL lesion 26 cm', radiology confirms 2.6 cm.

2026-06-05 MDT. 59M. Central right hilar tumour, small cell morphology on bronch bx. Bulky mediastinum and multiple liver lesions, no need for curative staging. Brain MRI: no evidence of mets. ECOG 1. Biomarkers not relevant/not reported in this note. Decision: systemic therapy, platinum-etoposide plus immunotherapy if labs ok. Palliative intent discussed.

MDT 2026-06-08. F 82. LUL nodule 1.8 cm, slow growth. PET no nodes, no mets. CT-guided bx adenoCa. EGFR positive, ALK neg, ROS1 neg, KRAS neg. PD-L1 TPS 0. ECOG 3, frail, home oxygen. Surgery/SABR judged too risky after discussion. Plan watchful_wait with repeat CT, symptom-led review. No active oncological treatment now.

MDT list 2026-06-09. 70 y male. RLL adenoca, primary around 3.4 cm. PET: ipsilateral hilar node and single bone met in left iliac, no liver/brain disease. Stage therefore metastatic, limited burden. EGFR neg, ALK neg, ROS1 neg, KRAS pos. PD-L1 TPS 85. ECOG 0. MDT decision systemic_therapy, IO-based first line; consider local RT later if oligomet response. 'Operable?' in GP letter is distractor, not MDT plan.
